prestazioni: Full carbon fiber reinforced S58B30T0 engine internals with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from VAC Motorsports for 800+ HP reliability on E85

Precision Raceworks Stage 3+ turbo kit featuring twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with 0.82 A/R titanium-aluminide turbine housings, custom 4-inch V-band downpipes, and a CSF Motorsport intercooler with 1,200 CFM core capacity

Motec M150 ECU with custom CAN bus integration for the G82's M-specific MDrive system, paired with a Pectel SQ6M dash logger and a Bosch Motorsport MS2.8 high-pressure fuel pump (3,000+ bar) for direct injection control
estetica: Full G82-specific Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber overfenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear), custom 3D-printed ABS diffuser, and a 2,000mm Gurney flap on the rear wing for 1,200 lbs of downforce at 180 mph

OEM+ carbon fiber M Performance front splitter with integrated Vorsteiner GT3-style dive planes and a custom 3M 1080 vinyl wrap in BMW Individual Frozen Portimao Blue with matte black accents on the kidney grilles and side skirts

Recaro Pole Position carbon fiber bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, a custom MCS Motorsport bolt-in roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly), and a titanium Akrapovic Evolution exhaust system with carbon fiber tips and a remote-activated bypass valve
